title: SHA-256 (FIPS 180-4) — full reference implementation
notes: SHA-256 maintains 8 32-bit state words initialized to the FIPS 180-4 IV. Processes 512-bit blocks with big-endian length encoding in the padding. Output is 32 bytes (256 bits). The K constants are the first 32 bits of the fractional parts of the cube roots of the first 64 primes.
